message:
feat(runtime): implement region poison and is_poisoned lifecycle functions

Add the implementations for asx_region_poison() and
asx_region_is_poisoned() in lifecycle.c, completing the region
containment API declared in runtime.h. Poisoning a region sets the
poisoned flag (idempotent), and is_poisoned provides a read-only
diagnostic query. These functions enable deterministic containment
after invariant violations without undefined behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
